package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringsIndexAnyNotMinusOneContainsAny() string {
    ruleID := "strings_index_any_not_minus_one_contains_any"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`strings.IndexAny(...) != -1` presence checks instead of `strings.ContainsAny(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
